$comment: The Go reference ratchet: cross-platform code generation verified by `go build`. All dirs default under this workdir. The oracle tool (go_build) is a .sh script the engine dispatches to bash on unix/WSL/macOS; add a .ps1 sibling to also run native on Windows. Launch with `ratchet <this-dir>`; one-shot with `ratchet flow <this-dir> go "..."`.
name: go
domain: Cross-platform Go code generation, verified with `go build`

requirements.name: go toolchain
requirements.hint: install Go (https://go.dev/dl) and put it on PATH

requirements.name: go toolbelt
requirements.hint: /do doctor_go for the full toolbelt report
